Metadata.title: HÁRPÁ | Exclusive Travel and Expeditions to Iceland
Metadata.description: The most complete itinerary on the market, an exclusive and intimate experience, with plenty of freedom and full enjoyment on expeditions to Iceland.

NotFound.subtitle: You may have typed the address incorrectly or the page may have been removed.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.section1Text: HÁRPÁ values your privacy and is committed to protecting the personal data shared through this form. We use your information exclusively to understand your needs, personalize our service, and offer experiences aligned with your interests.
PrivacyPolicy.section2Intro: By filling out this form, we may collect:
PrivacyPolicy.section2Item6: Preferences and information shared about the desired trip;
PrivacyPolicy.section2Item7: Other information provided voluntarily by you.
PrivacyPolicy.section3Intro: The collected data may be used to:
PrivacyPolicy.section3Item1: Get in touch regarding your request;
PrivacyPolicy.section3Item5: Comply with legal and regulatory obligations.
PrivacyPolicy.section3Outro: We will not use your information for purposes incompatible with those described in this Policy.
PrivacyPolicy.section4Text1: Your data may be shared only when necessary to enable the requested service, including strategic partners, service providers, or competent authorities, always in compliance with applicable data protection laws.
PrivacyPolicy.section4Text2: We do not sell or trade your personal data to third parties.
PrivacyPolicy.section5Text1: We adopt appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, loss, alteration, disclosure, or improper destruction.
PrivacyPolicy.section5Text2: Data will be stored for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this Policy or as required by law.
PrivacyPolicy.section6Intro: You may, at any time, request:
PrivacyPolicy.section6Item1: Confirmation of the existence of data processing;
PrivacyPolicy.section6Item3: Correction of incomplete or outdated information;
PrivacyPolicy.section7Text: For questions, requests, or to exercise your rights related to privacy and data protection, please contact us through the official channels provided by HÁRPÁ.
